{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191608606FF17A24472039A32D"}"},"total":6008},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577454022132695833","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真不错！主角红眼真的很励志，很热血，从小小的兔子到天梯boss，又是船上打工，又是照顾农场的，结果遇上了左成安后，农场都没了，奋发图强，努力报仇又被惦记上了双脚，但是勇敢兔兔不怕困难，尽凭借着一腿一耳，做服务生，慢慢的又发展起来，没想到最后连命都没了，幸好的是遇到了邪神附身，又重新活了过来，却发现哪怕实力增长在中三区没什么大用，委曲求全，忍痛割身之后没想到还是斗不过！励志兔兔的一生【我喜欢所有人！建楼那里真的太燃啦】"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764271741,"group_id":"7391470957807815742","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阿巴阿巴阿巴阿巴阿巴阿巴","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N11RhFeBOZ8z3DdSneYk2xaa11USCivp+fXawk2tA6RT","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/36c3f3b4fbc8448eaa2eed94bbdad9c1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705253&x-signature=ITSjowNmsYylJ5lMx9XpUc%2BOuw8%3D","user_id":"1912774319411747","user_name":"宴昕吃两碗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1912774319411747","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775474279,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7391470957807815742","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流】【轻松搞笑】【无女主】【直播】【爽】
左成安被拉入世界求生游戏，觉醒游戏唯一神级技能“真实之眼”！从此看到了游戏的另一面！
一根树枝摆在路边。
普通玩家:什么硌脚的东西?一边去！
左成安眼里:【被囚禁的八脚伯爵夫人喜爱的槐树枝，送给它后可以得到任务物品‘密室钥匙’】
NPC端上一桌美味佳肴。
众玩家:怕毒死，求放过。
左成安:【有毒，吃了会死】【微毒，吃了会看小人跳舞】【无毒，食用后力量+1】
怪物从玩家眼前走过。
众玩家:可怕，不敢惹不敢惹。
左成安:【HP2.1%（建议使用斩杀！）】
……
本以为是一场让人类走上进化的普通游戏，却不想只是一场满含恶意的阴谋陷害。
人类在副本里沉浮挣扎，艰难求生，不过是另外一片世界人解闷逗趣的乐子。
当左成安睁开双眸，登十二天梯，直指诸天伪神:
